text:
……ふん、お前か。
ファントムになると言うなら
その資格があるか、確かめてやる。

正々堂々などと甘えるな。
確実に、迅速に、手段を問わず
目的を果たせ。

それが出来なければ
《亡霊》とは認

You, is it? If you wish to become a Phantom,
then prove to me you have what it takes.

What is "fair" no longer concerns you.
Focus now on controlled, swift
decision-making, and the drive to
attain your goals no matter the cost.

Failure in any capacity will see you unfit to
join the Phantom realm.
